Modern Glass Villa

45 Ashok Dr, Los Angeles, CA

Description

Welcome to this stunning Modern Glass Villa situated in the hills of Los Angeles. Enjoy panoramic views, a sleek open-concept design, and luxurious amenities. This property offers the perfect blend of indoor and outdoor living with floor-to-ceiling windows and a private infinity pool.

Features

  • 4 Spacious Bedrooms
  • 3 Modern Bathrooms
  • 2,500 sqft of living space
  • Private infinity edge pool
  • Smart home integration
  • 2-car garage
  • Outdoor kitchen and patio
$1,250,000

Interested in this property? Contact our agent for more details or to schedule a private viewing today.
